title: SJTU IOC Lab website is now online
summary: Version 1.0.1 is now available with publications, people profiles, resource downloads, news, and lightweight admin analytics.
content:
Our lab website officially went online on 2026-03-27.

The current release is Version 1.0.1. It includes publication pages, people pages, resource download access, a lightweight News board, and simple admin analytics for page views and downloads.

Welcome to browse the site, read our papers, download available resources, check lab information, and use the shared materials for academic purposes.
